summary.value: Growth marketing and product management executive with 10+ years of experience driving digital transformation and revenue growth across travel tech, media, and e-commerce. Adept at comprehensive market analysis, developing data-driven strategies, and leveraging AI automation, Python coding, and financial modeling to optimize performance, scale operations, and foster cross-functional collaboration. Proven track record in managing high-performance teams and executing innovative digital campaigns—from SEO/SEM to product-led growth initiatives—that consistently deliver measurable results. Analytical, data-driven, and solutions-focused leader with hybrid skill sets, passionate about integrating emerging technologies with business development strategies to enhance customer engagement and market competitiveness in remote, global environments.

professionalExperience.title: Head of Product & Growth | AI-Driven Marketing & Automation

description.value:
Proactively manages and oversees the day-to-day business operations of an upscale international two-sided marketplace, composed of 900 vendor companies, +15000 complex bookable products, +4000 travelers, and a team of 20 employees, on a global distribution model.

Led a large-scale TripWays replatform and content migration into a custom WordPress architecture, preserving continuity across the marketplace while strengthening the underlying catalog and search experience.

Built and scaled an automation layer for inventory management and publishing, enabling products to be updated, launched, and maintained with far less manual effort while keeping live inventory synchronized.

Designed lifecycle workflows and operational controls for tour creation, updates, and vendor status management, improving reliability, reducing delays, and supporting faster go-to-market for new inventory.

Implemented AI-powered semantic discovery and recommendation capabilities to surface related tours and natural-language search results from live inventory, improving how travelers discover relevant options.

Reworked the catalog experience into a cleaner, SEO-friendly structure with stronger query handling and improved filtering, helping the site stay discoverable as the inventory expanded.

Built structured location and destination data workflows that improved tour quality and consistency at scale and helped prepare the marketplace for future integrations such as Google Things to Do.

Developed a high-performance cloud-based WordPress platform with real-time booking capabilities, while also supporting vendor onboarding, global operations, and 24/7 customer service across distributed teams.

Partnered with travel industry influencers and internal teams to execute marketing initiatives, track performance, and optimize paid campaigns and revenue growth across multiple channels.

professionalExperience.title: Sr. Growth Marketing – Audience and SEO

description.value:
Responsible for the CNET brand in the 'Media & Commerce' vertical at Red Ventures to diversify the audience and contribute to the audience acquisition and revenue growth strategies through many different channels on Google, YouTube, Amazon, and CNET.com platforms.

Successfully plugged-in to many different teams (Leadership, Engineering, Data, CE, SEO, Product, Editorial, Video, and Commerce) to manage cross functional optimization of the workflows, Implement the best practices, and providing a data-driven growth strategy for CNET in different business units (Amazon Publishing, Video Optimizations, SEO, Customer Experience)

Managing data pipe-lines from various sources, determining data needs & sources, developing SQL Queries, and analyze big data, to discover insights, define and align KPIs, and find growth opportunities.

Building real time dashboards, in-depth monitoring, analysis, and tracking KPIs through the sales funnel, to optimize step-by-step performance, and improve overall ROI for many on-site and off-site channels.

Contributing to the video content strategy by providing data-driven content ideas, optimization of the workflows and processes, and revenue generating best practices that results to the general growth of the YouTube, Social, and on-site channels. Insightfully contributed to the production of video series that moved many all-time records across the CNET channels, improved and diversified audience, and added new commerce-based revenue sources, resulted in a 2X impact in the affiliate revenue, and 4X impact on the Ad revenue.

Proactively contributed to the CNET SEO strategy to beat the traffic and revenue goals by managing the editorial and technical resources, prioritizing the highest revenue opportunities, expanding into the new topics, collaborating with the video team to make video content and implement the best practices for the video content, and contribute to the SEO playbook.

Actively managing day-to-day operations of Amazon on-site Publishing program and collaborate with editorial and technical teams to improve the content strategy, and profitability, resulting in a 5X sustainable growth in the first 6 months.

professionalExperience.title: Performance Optimization Manager | Paid Customer Acquisition

description.value: Recognized for optimal abilities in partnering with the travel industry influencers in implementing marketing strategies, tracking performance, and analyzing / optimizing the results across multiple paid campaigns.

professionalExperience.title: Co-Founder / Business Developer / Technical Project Manager

description.value:
Held a pivotal role in creating and managing a company, consisting of 50 personnel, from the ground up.

Successfully designed and developed an online platform that provided approximately 55.000 unique resources (Articles, Podcasts, Forums, and online resources in Farsi language), categorized in +800 different categories, and approximately 10M visitors monthly, resulting in a ranking of 999 in the world (20 in Iran) within a 3-year timeframe.

Held a pivotal role in developing content management strategies, leading to the website being ranked among the top 80 websites in Iran and top 2000 websites in the world, as well as having +15M sessions monthly with 80% organic traffic.

Proactively hired, managed, and oversaw a diverse cross-functional team, to include SEO specialists and copywriters, with a focus towards organizing workflow based on efficiency and performance.

Displayed exceptional abilities in planning a guideline for cross-functional department collaboration on marketing plans and business strategies based on keyword research, copywriting, content optimization, and SEO/SEM techniques, Monetization, and operations of the team.

Demonstrated exceptional abilities in implementing continuous improvements to systems in a developing country with limited access to knowledge and infrastructures.

Skillfully managed a large-scale migration of data from the old CMS into a highly sustainable WordPress platform running on self-managed AWS servers, leading to a significant improvement to the site experience by while saving 40% of the server costs and improved user experience and workflows.

Performed comprehensive quality assurance testing for semiconductor manufacturing equipment and software systems, ensuring compliance with industry standards and customer specifications.

Executed detailed test plans and procedures for complex hardware and software components, documenting defects and collaborating with engineering teams to resolve issues efficiently.

Utilized advanced testing methodologies and tools to validate product functionality, performance, and reliability across multiple product lines and customer environments.

Contributed to continuous improvement initiatives by analyzing testing processes, identifying optimization opportunities, and implementing best practices to enhance product quality and reduce time-to-market.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams including R&D, Manufacturing, and Customer Support to ensure seamless product delivery and customer satisfaction.

Maintained detailed documentation of test results, procedures, and equipment specifications, supporting regulatory compliance and knowledge transfer initiatives.

professionalExperience.title: Digital Marketing Manager / CRM Project Manager

description.value:
Led comprehensive digital marketing strategies and customer relationship management initiatives for a growing travel agency, driving customer acquisition and retention through multi-channel campaigns.

Developed and executed integrated digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, social media, and email marketing channels, resulting in 40% increase in online bookings and 25% improvement in customer engagement rates.

Implemented and managed CRM systems to streamline customer data management, automate marketing workflows, and enhance customer service delivery, leading to improved customer satisfaction scores and repeat business.

Analyzed customer behavior data and market trends to optimize marketing spend allocation, identify high-value customer segments, and develop targeted promotional campaigns that increased conversion rates by 30%.

Collaborated with travel consultants and operations teams to ensure seamless customer experience from initial inquiry to post-travel follow-up, maintaining high service quality standards.

Managed marketing budgets and vendor relationships, negotiating contracts with digital advertising platforms and marketing service providers to maximize ROI and campaign effectiveness.

Created compelling travel content and promotional materials for various digital channels, enhancing brand visibility and engagement across target markets.

professionalExperience.title: Jr. Digital Marketer / SEO Specialist / Copywriter

description.value:
Executed comprehensive digital marketing campaigns and SEO strategies for diverse client portfolios, contributing to improved online visibility and lead generation across multiple industries.

Conducted keyword research, competitive analysis, and technical SEO audits to identify optimization opportunities, resulting in average 60% improvement in organic search rankings for client websites.

Created compelling copy for websites, blog posts, email campaigns, and social media content, maintaining brand voice consistency while driving engagement and conversions.

Managed Google Ads campaigns and social media advertising initiatives, optimizing targeting parameters and ad creative to achieve cost-effective customer acquisition and improved ROI.

Analyzed website performance metrics using Google Analytics and other tools, providing actionable insights and recommendations to clients for continuous improvement of digital marketing efforts.

Collaborated with design and development teams to ensure SEO best practices were implemented during website creation and optimization projects.

Supported senior marketing team members in client presentations, strategy development, and campaign reporting, gaining valuable experience in client relationship management and digital marketing strategy.

Stayed current with industry trends and algorithm updates, continuously learning and adapting strategies to maintain competitive advantage for clients.

value.degree: Master of Business Management; Minor in Marketing
